summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of ForJenta project builder features for todo-app project with HTML + JavaScript badge implementation
passed_tests: Project type badge correctly displays 'HTML + JavaScript' for todo-app project with orange styling
Live preview successfully loads and displays 'My Todos' heading
Todo app functionality works correctly - input field and Add button operational
Console panel captures and displays preview logs including 'Todo app initialized'
Badge is properly positioned in preview header navigation area
ProjectTypeBadge component correctly detects HTML + JS project type
Preview iframe renders todo app with full functionality
Project navigation and switching between Code/App modes works properly
